title: [Nyessem, Promenade]
description: A long glass window tinted light green dominates one side of this room, offering guests a view of the halls below.  The luminescence of the area's walls, in combination with the blue mist above, casts a violet light across the white stone floor.  Arch-shaped hollows with emerald-threaded curtains cinched above them are carved into the walls, ready to be released when the additions to this area are completed.  A stone shelf is fused to the window and has many chairs pushed up to it.  A narrow descent returns to the Ring Loop.
